content:
# Emerald Business Saver Terms

## Customer Fit
Emerald Business Saver is offered as a business_savings account for business customers. Use it when the customer is comparing business savings options and needs a deposit account with a published APY and balance-based monthly fee waiver. See "Savings Account Comparison Guide" when comparing this account against other savings products.

## Opening Requirements
1. Confirm the applicant is a business customer before discussing account opening.
2. The minimum opening deposit is 5000. Do not treat a lower initial deposit as eligible for this product.
3. If the customer is choosing between deposit account types, compare only the listed product terms; do not infer eligibility from unrelated customer preferences.

## Rates and Fees
| Term | Emerald Business Saver |
| --- | --- |
| APY | 4.2 |
| Monthly fee | 10 |
| Fee waiver balance | 25000 |

The monthly fee applies unless the balance meets the fee waiver balance. Quote the fee and waiver threshold together so the customer understands both the recurring charge and the balance condition.

## Closing Terms
Emerald Business Saver has an early closure fee of 0 and an early closure window of 0. For employee handling steps, see "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy".
title: Emerald Business Saver Terms
